first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the reasoning across all sections (justification, strengths, concerns) is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify the candidate's strong general software engineering skills but also the critical lack of required domain expertise in Java/Kotlin, the Spring ecosystem, and IDE tooling. The minor differences in phrasing are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in assessment based on the candidate's name.
